case_title: BEE AUTOMOTIVE VS. STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTO INSURANCE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEE AUTOMOTIVE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTO INSURANCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,123.90 FILED BY BEE AUTOMOTIVE AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTO INSURANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEE AUTOMOTIVE AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTO INSURANCE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JUN-01-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTO INSURANCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
